creator: vsevolod@FreeBSD.org
text: What is invalid in `/usr/bin/env python`? Shar is *usually* requested for the new ports only, not for a maintainer update. Otherwise, what would you expect from `shar` that is not provided by `patch`? Cleaning of the obsolete files in your working dir, or what? If you want to fix something then please go and fix it, why do you want to make a flame where there is no need to do it at all?
